title: perdicesca repens
side_effects: Perdicesca repens can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea and dizziness, which may occur due to its high concentration of alkaloids. Consuming excessive amounts of the plant can also lead to stomach pain and diarrhea, as the digestive system struggles to process its toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of perdicesca repens can cause vomiting, headaches, and even respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and wheezing. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant to avoid these adverse side effects and ensure safe and effective use.
